sentences.arabic: فَتَحَ الطِّفْلُ التَّابْلِيتَ وَبَحَثَ عَنْ فِيدِيُو.
sentences.translation: Dijete je otvorilo tablet i tražilo video.
sentences.translationEn: The child opened the tablet and searched for a video.

sentences.arabic: وَجَدَ فِيدِيُو عَنِ الْحَيَوَانَاتِ وَضَغَطَ عَلَيْهِ.
sentences.translation: Pronašao je video o životinjama i kliknuo na njega.
sentences.translationEn: He found a video about animals and clicked on it.

sentences.arabic: جَلَسَ وَشَاهَدَهُ بِاهْتِمَامٍ لِمُدَّةِ نِصْفِ سَاعَةٍ.
sentences.translation: Sjeo je i pažljivo ga gledao pola sata.
sentences.translationEn: He sat and watched it attentively for half an hour.

sentences.translation: Naučio je mnoga nova imena životinja.
sentences.translationEn: He learned the names of many new animals.
